Project Description:
- Procurement of an on‑premise Identity & Access Management (IAM) system for the St. Georg group
- Scope: monitoring/administration of access rights for ~600 IT systems and ~2,800 users (all in AD)
- Goals: centralized, GDPR‑compliant identity/permission management; support onboarding/crossboarding/offboarding; flexible self‑service portal; connect 3rd‑party systems; minimize downtime (KRITIS environment)
- SaaS/Cloud excluded; operation in Klinikum virtual environment
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline (via DTVP): 28.10.2024
- Product presentations/probestellung: 18.11.2024–26.11.2024
- Award/binding period end: 22.01.2025
- Implementation window: 27.01.2025–30.06.2025

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Deliverables:
  - IAM software (perpetual) incl. installation, configuration, integration, testing, go‑live; AD/Exchange/Fileserver/Personal Office integration; operating manual; trainings; regular maintenance & support
  - Project implementation concept; project mgmt, reporting, risk mgmt; knowledge transfer
- Technical baseline (must):
  - Users: ≥2,800 concurrently addressable; hybrid IT
  - DB: Microsoft SQL Server 2019+; App server: Microsoft Server 2022+
  - Web‑based UI (DE), AD SSO; no internet/VPN dependency; no component must be internet‑reachable
  - VMware virtualization supported; backups/restore by Klinikum anytime
  - Patching ≥ quarterly; critical vulns CVSS ≥7.5 updated without delay
  - On‑premise only; SaaS/Cloud excluded
- Functions:
  - Workflows: graphical, flexible approval; escalations; role/permission requests; custom fields (incl. regex)
  - Lifecycle: joiner/mover/leaver; role mining (scored); recertification (selectable intervals, AD groups, fileservers, auditor read‑only)
  - Access mgmt: centralized, RBAC, field‑level permissions, org‑aligned rules, ease of use
  - PAM: flag privileged accounts; restrict AD‑based access; rule‑based grant/revoke; approval for privileged rights
  - Self‑service: resource/role requests; attribute self‑change; definable directory scope; password reset incl. AD (SAP optional, scored)
  - Reporting/monitoring; central identity repositories; admin actions from separate instances only
- Interfaces (must):
  - AD: CRUD users, OU placement, home drive, attribute mapping, init passwords, anomaly analysis
  - Fileserver (CIFS/SMBv2): AGDLP/AGP(A GGP)/AUP(A UUP); multi‑domain AGDLP; create/rename/delete dirs & groups; best‑practice ACL changes; owner rights; permission analysis; exports PDF/Excel/CSV
  - Exchange (incl. hybrid/online): groups, mailbox lifecycle, permissions, analyzers; self‑service mailbox access
  - IT helpdesk: Jira; Third‑party: open APIs (SOAP/REST/LDAP/SQL); MS/Citrix Terminal Services
- Security/Compliance:
  - Hardened per state of the art (incl. BSI Grundschutz); full audit trails of grants/changes and workflow steps
- Trainings & Docs:
  - 4 trainings (2× Admin, 2× key users/multipliers), DE; provide/update DE training materials
  - Operating manual (DE) covering architecture, installation, config, ops, backup, incident, patch/change, contingency; editable electronic format
- Service framework (EVB‑IT template):
  - Service times: Mon–Fri 08:00–17:00; tickets via AG system; provision of patches/updates/upgrades/releases upon request & when available
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Framework: 4 years + 1‑year extension option
- Licenses: min 2,800; max 4,500 users (for comparison)
- One‑off: system readiness (pauschal)
- Services: software maintenance/update/upgrade/releases per year for years 1–5 (year 5 optional)
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance: Klinikum St. Georg gGmbH, Delitzscher Straße 141, 04129 Leipzig; on‑premise in Klinikum virtual environment; remote delivery for the 15 PT contingent
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- ISO/IEC 27001 (or equivalent) – manufacturer (proof required)
- DSGVO/GDPR; BDSG; SGB X; E‑Health‑Gesetz; KRITIS‑Verordnung
- BSI Grundschutz (security hardening)
- AVV (Art. 28 DSGVO) included
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Consortia: allowed; declaration in text form; name all members; one authorized representative; joint and several liability
- Subcontractors: FB235 required; prior written consent; same obligations (confidentiality, data protection); capacity reliance allowed; notify changes
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Submit exclusively via www.dtvp.de in text form; German language; use client templates
- Include filled LV and price sheet; Form 633 (signed)
- Non‑portal submissions (email/fax/paper) lead to exclusion

List of Documents: Trade/professional register excerpt or equivalent; Gewerbean-/ummeldung if no register duty
Liability insurance proof with coverage sums
FB Umsatz: manufacturer avg. annual turnover ≥ 2.0 Mio € (2023–2021) in comparable services
FB Personal: bidder ≥ 10 FTE (Ø last 3 yrs) directly on IAM; manufacturer ≥ 50 FTE (Ø last 3 yrs)
Project managers: ≥ 3 years experience in subject; anonymized evidence
References: 1× hospital (≥2800 employees) + 2× companies (>2800 employees); last 3 years; include project, client, c

Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Prove turnover from comparable services as per FB Umsatz

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Register excerpt or equivalent; Gewerbean-/ummeldung if no register duty (copy)
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: FB235 listing; prior consent; capacity reliance with same obligations

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Roles: Project Manager/Project Lead (≥3 years IAM project leadership); IAM consultants/engineers; trainers
- Skills: AD/Exchange/Fileserver/SAP/Jira integration; workflow/role mining/recertification; RBAC; reporting; DE language for trainings/docs; BSI Grundschutz practices
- Constraints: staff are bidder’s employees or via Eignungsleihe; provide anonymized proofs
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Bidder: ≥10 FTE (Ø last 3 yrs) directly on IAM; Manufacturer: ≥50 FTE (Ø last 3 yrs)
- Access to ≥2 Project Managers
- Trainings: 2× Multipliers 0.5 d; 2× Admin 0.5 d (DE)
- Service times: Mon–Fri 08:00–17:00; Install files delivery ≤ 10 working days after request; 15 PT remote reserved
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects: - Key personnel: Project leadership experience ≥ 3 years in IAM scope (anonymized evidence)

Company Referrals:
- Provide references from the last 3 years:
- Min. 1 hospital reference (≥2800 employees) + 2 references from other companies (>2800 employees)
- For each: project name; client + address; client contact (email/phone); beds (for hospital); interface standard; in operation since
- For consortia: indicate which member delivered the reference
Award Criteria:
- Most economically advantageous tender based on:
- Price (60 points): lowest price = 60; linear interpolation up to 2× lowest price; 0.01× higher price = −0.6 pts; rounded to whole points
- Functionality (40 points): based on up to 67 pts (LV criteria max 18 + probestellung matrix max 49); top score = 40; linear interpolation; 0.01 lower sum = −0.4 pts; rounded to whole points
- Probestellung (49 pts) rating per item: 0.0 (insufficient) / 0.3 (adequate with limits) / 1.0 (fully meets)
- Functional matrix (examples & weights): F1–F7 usability/design/overview/time (w=4 each), F8–F10 robustness/adaptability (w=3), F11 workflow adaptability (w=4), F12 genehmiger UX (w=2), F13 audit filters (w=4), F14 export ease (w=2)
- Tie-break: higher Functionality score wins
- AG may skip trials/visits if bidder cannot win even with max Functionality
